title: spermacoce litoralis
intro: Spermacoce litoralis, also known as beach manzanita, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, and is also used to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Spermacoce litoralis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
